prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 6 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~2.5 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 64.2 kg; Height 184.8 cm; BMI 18.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 142/88 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.6%; 9 months ago 9.2%; 6 months ago 8.7%; 3 months ago 8.2%; current 7.1%), FPG (12 months ago 241mg/dL; 9 months ago 259mg/dL; 6 months ago 242mg/dL; 3 months ago 223mg/dL; current 187mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 63.7kg; 9 months ago 66.3kg; 6 months ago 61.1kg; 3 months ago 59.2kg; current 64.2kg), Height (12 months ago 184.8cm; 9 months ago 184.8cm; 6 months ago 184.8cm; 3 months ago 184.8cm; current 184.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 17.0kg/m²; current 18.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 137mmHg; 9 months ago 143mmHg; 6 months ago 138mmHg; 3 months ago 137mmHg; current 142mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 87mmHg; 9 months ago 88mmHg; 6 months ago 90mmHg; 3 months ago 87mmHg; current 88mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 6U/L; 6 months ago 13U/L; 3 months ago 5.9U/L; current 11U/L), AST (12 months ago 11U/L; 9 months ago 9U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 10U/L; current 15U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; current 53mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 248mg/g; 9 months ago 263mg/g; 6 months ago 380mg/g; 3 months ago 404mg/g; current 226mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 74mg/dL; 9 months ago 71mg/dL; 6 months ago 77mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 75mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 54mg/dL; 9 months ago 58mg/dL; 6 months ago 55mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 56mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 170mg/dL; 9 months ago 156mg/dL; 6 months ago 169mg/dL; 3 months ago 152mg/dL; current 162mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 14.8g/dL; 3 months ago 14.1g/dL; current 14.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.89 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
